name.zh: PHP 上传扩展名与文件名变体字典
name.en: PHP Upload Extension and Filename Variant Dictionary

description.zh: 汇总 PHP 替代扩展、双扩展、大小写、尾点、控制字符、分号和 NTFS ADS 文件名形式，用于比较上传校验、文件系统规范化与 Web 处理器映射；清单本身不代表文件可执行。
description.en: Catalogs alternative PHP extensions, double extensions, case variants, trailing dots, controls, semicolons, and NTFS ADS names for comparing upload validation, filesystem canonicalization, and web-handler mapping; the list alone does not prove executability.

overview.zh: PHP 上传扩展名与文件名变体字典用于审查原始 multipart 文件名经过应用清洗、文件系统规范化和服务器处理器选择后的最终结果。汇总 PHP 替代扩展、双扩展、大小写、尾点、控制字符、分号和 NTFS ADS 文件名形式，用于比较上传校验、文件系统规范化与 Web 处理器映射；清单本身不代表文件可执行。该条目迁入工具区，因为原内容是候选字典而不是完整请求；它只能用于选择样例，不能单凭命中宣告漏洞。执行前必须满足两个前提：存在授权的文件上传入口，并能观察原始文件名、最终存储名和下载响应头。所有样例都使用同一个无害文本标记，上传目录位于隔离测试环境。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: PHP Upload Extension and Filename Variant Dictionary reviews the final result after the raw multipart filename passes application sanitization, filesystem canonicalization, and server-handler selection. Catalogs alternative PHP extensions, double extensions, case variants, trailing dots, controls, semicolons, and NTFS ADS names for comparing upload validation, filesystem canonicalization, and web-handler mapping; the list alone does not prove executability. This entry moves to Tools because the source is a candidate dictionary rather than a complete request; it selects samples and cannot establish a vulnerability by matching alone. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: An authorized upload endpoint exposes the original name, final stored name, and download response headers. Every sample uses the same harmless text marker in an isolated upload environment. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: PHP 上传扩展名与文件名变体字典关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是原始 multipart 文件名经过应用清洗、文件系统规范化和服务器处理器选择后的最终结果发生安全边界错配。阳性需要证明某个变体最终落入 PHP 处理器并解释无副作用服务器端标记；仅上传成功、保留 .php 字样、返回 200 或静态下载均是假阳性边界。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: PHP Upload Extension and Filename Variant Dictionary is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in the final result after the raw multipart filename passes application sanitization, filesystem canonicalization, and server-handler selection. A positive result requires proof that a variant reaches a PHP handler and interprets a side-effect-free server marker; upload acceptance, a retained .php substring, HTTP 200, or static download are false-positive boundaries. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为PHP 上传扩展名与文件名变体字典建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。
exploitation.en: For PHP Upload Extension and Filename Variant Dictionary, establish one valid business sample and one explicit rejection control, then hold content, identity, and request path constant while replacing one source line at a time. Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: PHP 上传扩展名与文件名变体字典的修复策略是：使用服务端随机对象名、Web 根目录外不可执行存储，并联合校验规范扩展名、实际 MIME 与完整内容结构。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。
mitigation.en: For PHP Upload Extension and Filename Variant Dictionary, remediation is: Use server-generated object names, nonexecutable storage outside the web root, and jointly validate canonical extension, detected MIME, and complete content structure. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

title.zh: 界定“PHP 上传扩展名与文件名变体字典”入口
title.en: Define the PHP Upload Extension and Filename Variant Dictionary entry

description.zh: 定位输入参数、全部解码或规范化层、最终处理器和运行身份，并逐项确认前提“存在授权的文件上传入口，并能观察原始文件名、最终存储名和下载响应头。”与“所有样例都使用同一个无害文本标记，上传目录位于隔离测试环境。”。
description.en: Locate the input parameter, every decoding or canonicalization layer, the final processor, and runtime identity, then confirm both prerequisites: An authorized upload endpoint exposes the original name, final stored name, and download response headers. Every sample uses the same harmless text marker in an isolated upload environment.

title.zh: 建立“PHP 上传文件名字典”对照基线
title.en: Establish the PHP Upload Filename Dictionary control baseline

description.zh: 使用合法业务对象、明确拒绝对象和无敏感固定标记记录响应、规范值、文件或网络事件以及处理器选择，作为后续逐行比较基线。
description.en: Use a valid business object, an explicitly rejected object, and a nonsensitive fixed marker to record response, canonical value, file or network events, and processor selection as the line-by-line baseline.

title.zh: 逐行验证“PHP 上传扩展名与文件名变体字典”
title.en: Validate PHP Upload Extension and Filename Variant Dictionary line by line

description.zh: 严格保留原始集合的字节和顺序，每轮只提交一行，并把危险目标替换为隔离标记。按“阳性需要证明某个变体最终落入 PHP 处理器并解释无副作用服务器端标记；仅上传成功、保留 .php 字样、返回 200 或静态下载均是假阳性边界。”判定结果，禁止从字符串命中直接推导漏洞。
description.en: Preserve the original set byte-for-byte and in order, submit one line per run, and replace dangerous targets with isolated markers. Apply this result boundary: A positive result requires proof that a variant reaches a PHP handler and interprets a side-effect-free server marker; upload acceptance, a retained .php substring, HTTP 200, or static download are false-positive boundaries.

title.zh: 修复并回归“PHP 上传扩展名与文件名变体字典”
title.en: Remediate and regress PHP Upload Extension and Filename Variant Dictionary

description.zh: 实施“使用服务端随机对象名、Web 根目录外不可执行存储，并联合校验规范扩展名、实际 MIME 与完整内容结构。”后，从同一入口重放正常与异常对照；确认业务功能未退化、危险边界不可达，并删除本次测试产生的文件、归档、缓存和关联数据。
description.en: After applying this remediation: Use server-generated object names, nonexecutable storage outside the web root, and jointly validate canonical extension, detected MIME, and complete content structure. Replay normal and abnormal controls through the same entry, confirm business behavior remains intact and the dangerous boundary is unreachable, and delete files, archives, caches, and correlated data created by the test.

prerequisites.zh: 存在授权的文件上传入口，并能观察原始文件名、最终存储名和下载响应头。
prerequisites.en: An authorized upload endpoint exposes the original name, final stored name, and download response headers.

prerequisites.zh: 所有样例都使用同一个无害文本标记，上传目录位于隔离测试环境。
prerequisites.en: Every sample uses the same harmless text marker in an isolated upload environment.

analysis.zh: PHP 上传扩展名与文件名变体字典必须按实际数据流判定。阳性需要证明某个变体最终落入 PHP 处理器并解释无副作用服务器端标记；仅上传成功、保留 .php 字样、返回 200 或静态下载均是假阳性边界。还应保存原始值、完全解码或规范值、最终处理器、运行身份和同一请求 ID 的服务端证据，以区分入口接受、静态存储、读取、解析和执行。
analysis.en: PHP Upload Extension and Filename Variant Dictionary must be judged from the actual data flow. A positive result requires proof that a variant reaches a PHP handler and interprets a side-effect-free server marker; upload acceptance, a retained .php substring, HTTP 200, or static download are false-positive boundaries. Preserve the raw value, fully decoded or canonical value, final processor, runtime identity, and server evidence for the same request identifier to distinguish entry acceptance, static storage, reading, parsing, and execution.

opsecTips.zh: 验证“PHP 上传扩展名与文件名变体字典”时每轮只使用一个固定标记；一旦出现真实敏感数据、非预期解释、进程创建、写入、外连或服务不稳定，立即停止并保留请求 ID。
opsecTips.en: For PHP Upload Extension and Filename Variant Dictionary, use one fixed marker per run; stop immediately and retain the request identifier on real sensitive data, unintended interpretation, process creation, writes, egress, or service instability.

opsecTips.zh: 完成“PHP 上传扩展名与文件名变体字典”后删除上传文件、测试归档、标记文件和临时监听器，清理对象存储、CDN 与解析缓存，并按保留策略处理包含标记的日志。
opsecTips.en: After PHP Upload Extension and Filename Variant Dictionary, delete uploads, test archives, marker files, and temporary listeners, clear object-store, CDN, and parser caches, and handle marker-bearing logs under the retention policy.

review.rationale: PHP 上传扩展名与文件名变体字典迁入工具区，因为它是扩展名、媒体类型、魔数或路径候选字典，不是完整攻击请求，也不能单独证明漏洞。

name.zh: ASP 与 ASP.NET 上传扩展名字典
name.en: ASP and ASP.NET Upload Extension Dictionary

description.zh: 列出 ASP、ASP.NET 页面、处理器、服务与 Razor 相关扩展，用于核对 IIS 请求筛选、应用保存规则和 handler mapping 是否一致；扩展名被接受不能证明服务器端执行。
description.en: Lists ASP, ASP.NET page, handler, service, and Razor-related extensions to compare IIS request filtering, application storage rules, and handler mappings; extension acceptance does not prove server-side execution.

overview.zh: ASP 与 ASP.NET 上传扩展名字典用于审查IIS 版本、已安装模块和站点 handler mapping 对最终存储文件的实际处理。列出 ASP、ASP.NET 页面、处理器、服务与 Razor 相关扩展，用于核对 IIS 请求筛选、应用保存规则和 handler mapping 是否一致；扩展名被接受不能证明服务器端执行。该条目迁入工具区，因为原内容是候选字典而不是完整请求；它只能用于选择样例，不能单凭命中宣告漏洞。执行前必须满足两个前提：测试人员能够读取目标 IIS 站点的处理器映射或等价请求跟踪证据。上传内容仅包含无害固定标记，并且测试路径不承载生产文件。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: ASP and ASP.NET Upload Extension Dictionary reviews the actual treatment of the stored file by the IIS version, installed modules, and site handler mappings. Lists ASP, ASP.NET page, handler, service, and Razor-related extensions to compare IIS request filtering, application storage rules, and handler mappings; extension acceptance does not prove server-side execution. This entry moves to Tools because the source is a candidate dictionary rather than a complete request; it selects samples and cannot establish a vulnerability by matching alone. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: The tester can inspect the target IIS handler mappings or equivalent request-tracing evidence. Uploaded content contains only a harmless fixed marker, and the test path holds no production files. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: ASP 与 ASP.NET 上传扩展名字典关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是IIS 版本、已安装模块和站点 handler mapping 对最终存储文件的实际处理发生安全边界错配。阳性必须由 IIS 日志或处理器跟踪证明文件被脚本处理器解释；保存、重命名、拒绝、静态返回以及不存在对应模块都不是执行漏洞。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: ASP and ASP.NET Upload Extension Dictionary is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in the actual treatment of the stored file by the IIS version, installed modules, and site handler mappings. A positive requires IIS logs or handler tracing showing interpretation by a script handler; storage, renaming, denial, static serving, or an absent module do not establish execution. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为ASP 与 ASP.NET 上传扩展名字典建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。
exploitation.en: For ASP and ASP.NET Upload Extension Dictionary, establish one valid business sample and one explicit rejection control, then hold content, identity, and request path constant while replacing one source line at a time. Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: ASP 与 ASP.NET 上传扩展名字典的修复策略是：把上传目录设为不可执行，移除不需要的 handler，使用随机存储名并在规范化后执行扩展名和内容允许列表。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。
mitigation.en: For ASP and ASP.NET Upload Extension Dictionary, remediation is: Make upload storage nonexecutable, remove unused handlers, assign random storage names, and enforce extension and content allowlists after canonicalization. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

name.zh: JSP 与 Java Web 上传扩展名字典
name.en: JSP and Java Web Upload Extension Dictionary

description.zh: 收集 JSP、JSPX、片段扩展及大小写、分号、空字节和 ADS 变体，用于比较 Java Web 应用保存逻辑与 servlet mapping；文件名命中列表不等于容器会编译或执行。
description.en: Collects JSP, JSPX, fragment extensions, casing, semicolon, null-byte, and ADS variants to compare Java web storage logic with servlet mappings; a matching filename does not mean the container will compile or execute it.

subCategory.zh: Java Web 上传扩展名字典

overview.zh: JSP 与 Java Web 上传扩展名字典用于审查应用保存名、部署目录和 servlet 映射共同决定的 JSP 解析边界。收集 JSP、JSPX、片段扩展及大小写、分号、空字节和 ADS 变体，用于比较 Java Web 应用保存逻辑与 servlet mapping；文件名命中列表不等于容器会编译或执行。该条目迁入工具区，因为原内容是候选字典而不是完整请求；它只能用于选择样例，不能单凭命中宣告漏洞。执行前必须满足两个前提：已确认目标 Java 容器类型、版本、部署目录和 JSP servlet 映射。使用不可执行的测试标记内容，并能在测试结束后删除全部上传对象。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: JSP and Java Web Upload Extension Dictionary reviews the JSP parsing boundary jointly determined by the application storage name, deployment directory, and servlet mappings. Collects JSP, JSPX, fragment extensions, casing, semicolon, null-byte, and ADS variants to compare Java web storage logic with servlet mappings; a matching filename does not mean the container will compile or execute it. This entry moves to Tools because the source is a candidate dictionary rather than a complete request; it selects samples and cannot establish a vulnerability by matching alone. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: The Java container type, version, deployment directory, and JSP servlet mapping are known. A nonexecutable marker is used, and every uploaded object can be removed after testing. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

mitigation.en: For Static Media and Markup Extension Dictionary, remediation is: Allow only required passive formats, re-encode images, reject or isolate SVG, HTML, and XML, and serve downloads with attachment and nosniff headers. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

title.zh: 逐行验证“静态媒体与标记文件扩展名字典”

description.zh: 严格保留原始集合的字节和顺序，每轮只提交一行，并把危险目标替换为隔离标记。按“阳性应证明主动内容被以内联可执行上下文返回或被错误解析器处理；后缀被接受、附件下载或安全重编码都不属于漏洞。”判定结果，禁止从字符串命中直接推导漏洞。

title.zh: 修复并回归“静态媒体与标记文件扩展名字典”

description.zh: 实施“只允许必要的被动格式，重编码图片，拒绝或隔离 SVG/HTML/XML，并设置附件下载和 nosniff 响应头。”后，从同一入口重放正常与异常对照；确认业务功能未退化、危险边界不可达，并删除本次测试产生的文件、归档、缓存和关联数据。

analysis.en: Static Media and Markup Extension Dictionary must be judged from the actual data flow. A positive must show active content returned in an executable inline context or sent to the wrong parser; suffix acceptance, attachment download, or safe re-encoding are not vulnerabilities. Preserve the raw value, fully decoded or canonical value, final processor, runtime identity, and server evidence for the same request identifier to distinguish entry acceptance, static storage, reading, parsing, and execution.

name.zh: 上传 Content-Type 与媒体类型字典
name.en: Upload Content-Type and Media Type Dictionary

description.zh: 收集图片、文本、脚本、归档、二进制、音视频和表单媒体类型，用于核对 multipart 声明、服务端检测和下游解析器选择；客户端 Content-Type 可伪造，不能单独证明文件类型。
description.en: Collects image, text, script, archive, binary, audiovisual, and form media types for comparing multipart declarations, server-side detection, and downstream parser selection; client Content-Type is forgeable and cannot prove file type alone.

overview.zh: 上传 Content-Type 与媒体类型字典用于审查multipart 部件头、服务器嗅探结果和实际内容解析器选择是否保持一致。收集图片、文本、脚本、归档、二进制、音视频和表单媒体类型，用于核对 multipart 声明、服务端检测和下游解析器选择；客户端 Content-Type 可伪造，不能单独证明文件类型。该条目迁入工具区，因为原内容是候选字典而不是完整请求；它只能用于选择样例，不能单凭命中宣告漏洞。执行前必须满足两个前提：能够捕获原始 multipart 请求和服务端记录的检测 MIME，而不是只看浏览器展示。为每个允许格式准备结构完整的安全样本和一个类型不匹配的对照样本。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: Upload Content-Type and Media Type Dictionary reviews whether multipart part headers, server-side detection, and actual content-parser selection remain consistent. Collects image, text, script, archive, binary, audiovisual, and form media types for comparing multipart declarations, server-side detection, and downstream parser selection; client Content-Type is forgeable and cannot prove file type alone. This entry moves to Tools because the source is a candidate dictionary rather than a complete request; it selects samples and cannot establish a vulnerability by matching alone. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: Raw multipart requests and the server-detected MIME are observable rather than only the browser presentation. A structurally valid safe sample and one type-mismatch control are prepared for each allowed format. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: 上传 Content-Type 与媒体类型字典关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是multipart 部件头、服务器嗅探结果和实际内容解析器选择是否保持一致发生安全边界错配。阳性要求伪造声明导致危险解析器、内联主动内容或越权处理被实际选中；状态码变化、回显请求头或仅信任扩展名都只是线索。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: Upload Content-Type and Media Type Dictionary is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in whether multipart part headers, server-side detection, and actual content-parser selection remain consistent. A positive requires a forged declaration to select a dangerous parser, inline active content, or unauthorized processing; status changes, reflected headers, or extension-only trust are clues rather than proof. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为上传 Content-Type 与媒体类型字典建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。

Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.en: For Upload Content-Type and Media Type Dictionary, remediation is: Do not trust the client type; combine allowed extensions, reliable detection, full decoding, and safe re-encoding, and set a fixed response type on download. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

description.en: Use a valid business object, an explicitly rejected object, and a nonsensitive fixed marker to record response, canonical value, file or network events, and processor selection as the line-by-line baseline.

title.zh: 逐行验证“Python 代码与扩展模块上传后缀字典”
title.en: Validate Python Code and Extension-Module Upload Suffix Dictionary line by line

description.zh: 严格保留原始集合的字节和顺序，每轮只提交一行，并把危险目标替换为隔离标记。按“阳性需要导入审计或加载器日志证明上传对象被自动加载；文件保存、下载或手工管理员导入不能证明上传入口自身导致执行。”判定结果，禁止从字符串命中直接推导漏洞。
description.en: Preserve the original set byte-for-byte and in order, submit one line per run, and replace dangerous targets with isolated markers. Apply this result boundary: A positive requires import audit or loader logs proving automatic loading of the upload; storage, download, or a manual administrator import does not prove execution caused by the upload entry.

title.zh: 修复并回归“Python 代码与扩展模块上传后缀字典”
title.en: Remediate and regress Python Code and Extension-Module Upload Suffix Dictionary

description.zh: 实施“将上传目录移出 Python 搜索路径，关闭用户可控插件发现，并以固定业务解析器处理允许文件。”后，从同一入口重放正常与异常对照；确认业务功能未退化、危险边界不可达，并删除本次测试产生的文件、归档、缓存和关联数据。
description.en: After applying this remediation: Keep upload storage outside Python search paths, disable user-controlled plugin discovery, and process allowed files with fixed business parsers. Replay normal and abnormal controls through the same entry, confirm business behavior remains intact and the dangerous boundary is unreachable, and delete files, archives, caches, and correlated data created by the test.

prerequisites.zh: 已识别实际 Python 版本、导入路径和任何插件或任务自动发现机制。
prerequisites.en: The actual Python version, import paths, and any plugin or task auto-discovery mechanism are identified.

prerequisites.zh: 测试模块仅暴露无副作用固定常量，并在隔离进程中验证加载。
prerequisites.en: The test module exposes only a side-effect-free fixed constant and is loaded in an isolated process.

analysis.zh: Python 代码与扩展模块上传后缀字典必须按实际数据流判定。阳性需要导入审计或加载器日志证明上传对象被自动加载；文件保存、下载或手工管理员导入不能证明上传入口自身导致执行。还应保存原始值、完全解码或规范值、最终处理器、运行身份和同一请求 ID 的服务端证据，以区分入口接受、静态存储、读取、解析和执行。
analysis.en: Python Code and Extension-Module Upload Suffix Dictionary must be judged from the actual data flow. A positive requires import audit or loader logs proving automatic loading of the upload; storage, download, or a manual administrator import does not prove execution caused by the upload entry. Preserve the raw value, fully decoded or canonical value, final processor, runtime identity, and server evidence for the same request identifier to distinguish entry acceptance, static storage, reading, parsing, and execution.

opsecTips.zh: 验证“Python 代码与扩展模块上传后缀字典”时每轮只使用一个固定标记；一旦出现真实敏感数据、非预期解释、进程创建、写入、外连或服务不稳定，立即停止并保留请求 ID。
opsecTips.en: For Python Code and Extension-Module Upload Suffix Dictionary, use one fixed marker per run; stop immediately and retain the request identifier on real sensitive data, unintended interpretation, process creation, writes, egress, or service instability.

opsecTips.zh: 完成“Python 代码与扩展模块上传后缀字典”后删除上传文件、测试归档、标记文件和临时监听器，清理对象存储、CDN 与解析缓存，并按保留策略处理包含标记的日志。
opsecTips.en: After Python Code and Extension-Module Upload Suffix Dictionary, delete uploads, test archives, marker files, and temporary listeners, clear object-store, CDN, and parser caches, and handle marker-bearing logs under the retention policy.

review.rationale: Python 代码与扩展模块上传后缀字典迁入工具区，因为它是扩展名、媒体类型、魔数或路径候选字典，不是完整攻击请求，也不能单独证明漏洞。

name.zh: Ruby 代码与模板上传后缀字典
name.en: Ruby Code and Template Upload Suffix Dictionary

description.zh: 覆盖 Ruby 脚本、Rack 配置和 ERB、Haml、Slim 模板后缀，用于检查上传数据是否跨入 require、模板渲染或应用启动边界；模板后缀被保存不等于被渲染。
description.en: Covers Ruby scripts, Rack configuration, and ERB, Haml, and Slim template suffixes for checking whether upload data crosses require, template-rendering, or application-start boundaries; storing a template suffix does not mean rendering occurs.

overview.zh: Ruby 代码与模板上传后缀字典用于审查上传目录与 Ruby load path、Rack 启动文件和模板查找目录之间的隔离。覆盖 Ruby 脚本、Rack 配置和 ERB、Haml、Slim 模板后缀，用于检查上传数据是否跨入 require、模板渲染或应用启动边界；模板后缀被保存不等于被渲染。该条目迁入工具区，因为原内容是候选字典而不是完整请求；它只能用于选择样例，不能单凭命中宣告漏洞。执行前必须满足两个前提：已确认目标使用的 Ruby、Rack 和模板引擎及其文件查找规则。测试文件只渲染固定文本，不包含系统调用、网络请求或文件写入。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: Ruby Code and Template Upload Suffix Dictionary reviews isolation between upload storage and Ruby load paths, Rack startup files, and template lookup directories. Covers Ruby scripts, Rack configuration, and ERB, Haml, and Slim template suffixes for checking whether upload data crosses require, template-rendering, or application-start boundaries; storing a template suffix does not mean rendering occurs. This entry moves to Tools because the source is a candidate dictionary rather than a complete request; it selects samples and cannot establish a vulnerability by matching alone. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: The target Ruby, Rack, and template engines and their lookup rules are confirmed. Test files render fixed text only and contain no system call, network request, or file write. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: Ruby 代码与模板上传后缀字典关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是上传目录与 Ruby load path、Rack 启动文件和模板查找目录之间的隔离发生安全边界错配。阳性需要渲染日志或加载跟踪证明上传对象进入解释器；文件名被保留、源码下载、语法错误或管理员手动移动文件都不成立。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: Ruby Code and Template Upload Suffix Dictionary is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in isolation between upload storage and Ruby load paths, Rack startup files, and template lookup directories. A positive requires render logs or load tracing proving entry into an interpreter; retained names, source download, syntax errors, or manual administrator movement do not qualify. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为Ruby 代码与模板上传后缀字典建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。
exploitation.en: For Ruby Code and Template Upload Suffix Dictionary, establish one valid business sample and one explicit rejection control, then hold content, identity, and request path constant while replacing one source line at a time. Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: Ruby 代码与模板上传后缀字典的修复策略是：隔离上传存储和模板根目录，禁用动态模板路径，使用服务端对象映射并限制允许格式。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。
mitigation.en: For Ruby Code and Template Upload Suffix Dictionary, remediation is: Separate upload storage from template roots, disable dynamic template paths, use server-side object mapping, and restrict allowed formats. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

name.zh: Node.js 与前端脚本上传后缀字典

description.zh: 列出 CommonJS、ES Module、TypeScript、JSX 和 CoffeeScript 后缀，用于区分服务端模块加载、构建管线摄入和浏览器脚本返回三类边界；后缀命中本身没有执行语义。
description.en: Lists CommonJS, ES module, TypeScript, JSX, and CoffeeScript suffixes to distinguish server module loading, build-pipeline ingestion, and browser script serving; a suffix match has no execution semantics by itself.

overview.zh: Node.js 与前端脚本上传后缀字典用于审查上传对象是否进入 Node 模块解析、自动构建输入或可内联执行的浏览器资源路径。列出 CommonJS、ES Module、TypeScript、JSX 和 CoffeeScript 后缀，用于区分服务端模块加载、构建管线摄入和浏览器脚本返回三类边界；后缀命中本身没有执行语义。该条目迁入工具区，因为原内容是候选字典而不是完整请求；它只能用于选择样例，不能单凭命中宣告漏洞。执行前必须满足两个前提：能够区分服务端模块目录、构建源目录和静态资源目录。测试脚本仅设置固定标记，不访问进程、文件系统、网络或用户数据。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: Node.js and Frontend Script Upload Suffix Dictionary reviews whether an upload enters Node module resolution, automatic build inputs, or browser resources served in an executable inline context. Lists CommonJS, ES module, TypeScript, JSX, and CoffeeScript suffixes to distinguish server module loading, build-pipeline ingestion, and browser script serving; a suffix match has no execution semantics by itself. This entry moves to Tools because the source is a candidate dictionary rather than a complete request; it selects samples and cannot establish a vulnerability by matching alone. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: Server module directories, build-source directories, and static-resource directories can be distinguished. The test script sets a fixed marker only and does not access process, filesystem, network, or user data. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: Node.js 与前端脚本上传后缀字典关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是上传对象是否进入 Node 模块解析、自动构建输入或可内联执行的浏览器资源路径发生安全边界错配。阳性需由 Node 加载跟踪、构建日志或浏览器执行上下文证明脚本被处理；静态附件、源码显示或未引用资源不是执行。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: Node.js and Frontend Script Upload Suffix Dictionary is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in whether an upload enters Node module resolution, automatic build inputs, or browser resources served in an executable inline context. A positive needs Node load tracing, build logs, or a browser execution context proving script processing; static attachment, source display, or an unreferenced resource is not execution. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: Node.js 与前端脚本上传后缀字典的修复策略是：上传目录不得进入模块或构建搜索路径，主动脚本一律作为附件或独立来源返回，并设置严格 CSP 和 nosniff。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。

From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

description.en: After applying this remediation: Keep uploads out of module and build search paths, serve active scripts as attachments or from an isolated origin, and apply strict CSP and nosniff. Replay normal and abnormal controls through the same entry, confirm business behavior remains intact and the dangerous boundary is unreachable, and delete files, archives, caches, and correlated data created by the test.

prerequisites.zh: 能够区分服务端模块目录、构建源目录和静态资源目录。
prerequisites.en: Server module directories, build-source directories, and static-resource directories can be distinguished.

prerequisites.zh: 测试脚本仅设置固定标记，不访问进程、文件系统、网络或用户数据。
prerequisites.en: The test script sets a fixed marker only and does not access process, filesystem, network, or user data.

analysis.zh: Node.js 与前端脚本上传后缀字典必须按实际数据流判定。阳性需由 Node 加载跟踪、构建日志或浏览器执行上下文证明脚本被处理；静态附件、源码显示或未引用资源不是执行。还应保存原始值、完全解码或规范值、最终处理器、运行身份和同一请求 ID 的服务端证据，以区分入口接受、静态存储、读取、解析和执行。
analysis.en: Node.js and Frontend Script Upload Suffix Dictionary must be judged from the actual data flow. A positive needs Node load tracing, build logs, or a browser execution context proving script processing; static attachment, source display, or an unreferenced resource is not execution. Preserve the raw value, fully decoded or canonical value, final processor, runtime identity, and server evidence for the same request identifier to distinguish entry acceptance, static storage, reading, parsing, and execution.

opsecTips.zh: 验证“Node.js 与前端脚本上传后缀字典”时每轮只使用一个固定标记；一旦出现真实敏感数据、非预期解释、进程创建、写入、外连或服务不稳定，立即停止并保留请求 ID。
opsecTips.en: For Node.js and Frontend Script Upload Suffix Dictionary, use one fixed marker per run; stop immediately and retain the request identifier on real sensitive data, unintended interpretation, process creation, writes, egress, or service instability.

opsecTips.zh: 完成“Node.js 与前端脚本上传后缀字典”后删除上传文件、测试归档、标记文件和临时监听器，清理对象存储、CDN 与解析缓存，并按保留策略处理包含标记的日志。
opsecTips.en: After Node.js and Frontend Script Upload Suffix Dictionary, delete uploads, test archives, marker files, and temporary listeners, clear object-store, CDN, and parser caches, and handle marker-bearing logs under the retention policy.

review.rationale: Node.js 与前端脚本上传后缀字典迁入工具区，因为它是扩展名、媒体类型、魔数或路径候选字典，不是完整攻击请求，也不能单独证明漏洞。

name.zh: 文件魔数与签名检测字典
name.en: File Magic and Signature Detection Dictionary

description.zh: 收集 GIF、PNG、JPEG、PDF、ZIP、BMP、TIFF、RIFF、GZIP、7-Zip、XML 和 SVG 的常见起始字节，用于测试检测器是否只看短前缀；签名匹配不能证明文件结构完整或内容安全。
description.en: Collects common leading bytes for GIF, PNG, JPEG, PDF, ZIP, BMP, TIFF, RIFF, GZIP, 7-Zip, XML, and SVG to test short-prefix detection; a signature match proves neither structural validity nor safe content.

overview.zh: 文件魔数与签名检测字典用于审查魔数前缀、完整格式解析、嵌套内容和最终业务解析器之间的检测深度。收集 GIF、PNG、JPEG、PDF、ZIP、BMP、TIFF、RIFF、GZIP、7-Zip、XML 和 SVG 的常见起始字节，用于测试检测器是否只看短前缀；签名匹配不能证明文件结构完整或内容安全。该条目迁入工具区，因为原内容是候选字典而不是完整请求；它只能用于选择样例，不能单凭命中宣告漏洞。执行前必须满足两个前提：测试环境能够保留原始字节，并记录 libmagic 或等价检测器及业务解析器结果。为每种格式准备合法文件、仅含前缀的截断文件和结构不匹配的对照文件。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: File Magic and Signature Detection Dictionary reviews detection depth across magic prefixes, complete format parsing, nested content, and the final business parser. Collects common leading bytes for GIF, PNG, JPEG, PDF, ZIP, BMP, TIFF, RIFF, GZIP, 7-Zip, XML, and SVG to test short-prefix detection; a signature match proves neither structural validity nor safe content. This entry moves to Tools because the source is a candidate dictionary rather than a complete request; it selects samples and cannot establish a vulnerability by matching alone. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: The test environment preserves raw bytes and records libmagic or equivalent detection and business-parser results. A valid file, a prefix-only truncated file, and a structure-mismatch control are prepared for each format. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: 文件魔数与签名检测字典关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是魔数前缀、完整格式解析、嵌套内容和最终业务解析器之间的检测深度发生安全边界错配。阳性需要短前缀伪装使危险内容进入错误解析器或绕过策略；检测器只报告类型、文件随后被拒绝或安全重编码均不是漏洞。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: File Magic and Signature Detection Dictionary is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in detection depth across magic prefixes, complete format parsing, nested content, and the final business parser. A positive requires a short-prefix disguise to reach the wrong parser or bypass policy; a detector label followed by rejection or safe re-encoding is not a vulnerability. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为文件魔数与签名检测字典建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。
exploitation.en: For File Magic and Signature Detection Dictionary, establish one valid business sample and one explicit rejection control, then hold content, identity, and request path constant while replacing one source line at a time. Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: 文件魔数与签名检测字典的修复策略是：使用完整格式解析与解码后重编码，限制嵌套和多格式文件，检测结果与扩展名、MIME 和业务允许列表交叉验证。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。
mitigation.en: For File Magic and Signature Detection Dictionary, remediation is: Fully parse and decode then re-encode formats, restrict nested and polyglot content, and cross-check detection with extension, MIME, and the business allowlist. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

title.zh: 界定“文件魔数与签名检测字典”入口
title.en: Define the File Magic and Signature Detection Dictionary entry

description.zh: 定位输入参数、全部解码或规范化层、最终处理器和运行身份，并逐项确认前提“测试环境能够保留原始字节，并记录 libmagic 或等价检测器及业务解析器结果。”与“为每种格式准备合法文件、仅含前缀的截断文件和结构不匹配的对照文件。”。
description.en: Locate the input parameter, every decoding or canonicalization layer, the final processor, and runtime identity, then confirm both prerequisites: The test environment preserves raw bytes and records libmagic or equivalent detection and business-parser results. A valid file, a prefix-only truncated file, and a structure-mismatch control are prepared for each format.

title.zh: 建立“文件签名字典”对照基线
title.en: Establish the File Signature Dictionary control baseline

description.zh: 使用合法业务对象、明确拒绝对象和无敏感固定标记记录响应、规范值、文件或网络事件以及处理器选择，作为后续逐行比较基线。
description.en: Use a valid business object, an explicitly rejected object, and a nonsensitive fixed marker to record response, canonical value, file or network events, and processor selection as the line-by-line baseline.

title.zh: 逐行验证“文件魔数与签名检测字典”
title.en: Validate File Magic and Signature Detection Dictionary line by line

description.zh: 严格保留原始集合的字节和顺序，每轮只提交一行，并把危险目标替换为隔离标记。按“阳性需要短前缀伪装使危险内容进入错误解析器或绕过策略；检测器只报告类型、文件随后被拒绝或安全重编码均不是漏洞。”判定结果，禁止从字符串命中直接推导漏洞。
description.en: Preserve the original set byte-for-byte and in order, submit one line per run, and replace dangerous targets with isolated markers. Apply this result boundary: A positive requires a short-prefix disguise to reach the wrong parser or bypass policy; a detector label followed by rejection or safe re-encoding is not a vulnerability.

name.zh: PHP Filter、Data、Expect 与无效 Input Wrapper 混合集
name.en: Mixed PHP Filter, Data, Expect, and Invalid Input Wrappers

description.zh: 该集合混合源码读取过滤器、内联 data 流、依赖 PECL expect 扩展的命令流，以及并非 PHP 注册 scheme 的 input:// 形式，必须按真实文件 API 和配置前提拆分，不能统一标成 RCE。
description.en: This collection mixes source-reading filters, inline data streams, command streams requiring the PECL expect extension, and input:// forms that are not a registered PHP scheme; it must be split by actual file API and configuration rather than labeled uniformly as RCE.

overview.zh: PHP Filter、Data、Expect 与无效 Input Wrapper 混合集用于审查读取函数与 include/require 的差异、allow_url_include 配置、expect 扩展可用性以及 scheme 是否真实注册。该集合混合源码读取过滤器、内联 data 流、依赖 PECL expect 扩展的命令流，以及并非 PHP 注册 scheme 的 input:// 形式，必须按真实文件 API 和配置前提拆分，不能统一标成 RCE。该条目必须拆分，因为同一命令跨越多个入口或解析器；每一行只能按其真实 sink 归入对应目标。执行前必须满足两个前提：能够从代码或跟踪确定输入进入 fopen、file_get_contents、include 或 require 中的哪一个 API。已记录 PHP 版本、allow_url_fopen、allow_url_include、已注册 wrapper 和 PECL expect 状态。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: Mixed PHP Filter, Data, Expect, and Invalid Input Wrappers reviews differences between read functions and include or require, allow_url_include settings, expect-extension availability, and whether a scheme is actually registered. This collection mixes source-reading filters, inline data streams, command streams requiring the PECL expect extension, and input:// forms that are not a registered PHP scheme; it must be split by actual file API and configuration rather than labeled uniformly as RCE. This entry must be split because one command crosses multiple entries or parsers; every line belongs only to the target matching its real sink. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: Code or tracing identifies whether input reaches fopen, file_get_contents, include, or require. PHP version, allow_url_fopen, allow_url_include, registered wrappers, and PECL expect status are recorded. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: PHP Filter、Data、Expect 与无效 Input Wrapper 混合集关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是读取函数与 include/require 的差异、allow_url_include 配置、expect 扩展可用性以及 scheme 是否真实注册发生安全边界错配。每组只接受对应结果：filter 需返回标记源码，data 需被目标 API 实际读取或解释，expect 需有扩展和受控进程证据；URI 回显、警告、base64 文本或 input:// 错误均是假阳性。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: Mixed PHP Filter, Data, Expect, and Invalid Input Wrappers is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in differences between read functions and include or require, allow_url_include settings, expect-extension availability, and whether a scheme is actually registered. Each branch has separate proof: filter must return marker source, data must be read or interpreted by the target API, and expect needs the extension plus controlled process evidence; URI reflection, warnings, base64 text, or input:// errors are false positives. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为PHP Filter、Data、Expect 与无效 Input Wrapper 混合集建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。
exploitation.en: For Mixed PHP Filter, Data, Expect, and Invalid Input Wrappers, establish one valid business sample and one explicit rejection control, then hold content, identity, and request path constant while replacing one source line at a time. Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: PHP Filter、Data、Expect 与无效 Input Wrapper 混合集的修复策略是：文件读取改为对象 ID 与固定根目录，禁止用户输入进入 include/require，关闭不需要的 URL wrapper 和 expect 扩展。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。
mitigation.en: For Mixed PHP Filter, Data, Expect, and Invalid Input Wrappers, remediation is: Use object IDs and a fixed root for file reads, prevent user input from reaching include or require, and disable unneeded URL wrappers and the expect extension. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

title.en: Remediate and regress Mixed PHP Filter, Data, Expect, and Invalid Input Wrappers

description.zh: 实施“文件读取改为对象 ID 与固定根目录，禁止用户输入进入 include/require，关闭不需要的 URL wrapper 和 expect 扩展。”后，从同一入口重放正常与异常对照；确认业务功能未退化、危险边界不可达，并删除本次测试产生的文件、归档、缓存和关联数据。
description.en: After applying this remediation: Use object IDs and a fixed root for file reads, prevent user input from reaching include or require, and disable unneeded URL wrappers and the expect extension. Replay normal and abnormal controls through the same entry, confirm business behavior remains intact and the dangerous boundary is unreachable, and delete files, archives, caches, and correlated data created by the test.

prerequisites.zh: 能够从代码或跟踪确定输入进入 fopen、file_get_contents、include 或 require 中的哪一个 API。
prerequisites.en: Code or tracing identifies whether input reaches fopen, file_get_contents, include, or require.

prerequisites.zh: 已记录 PHP 版本、allow_url_fopen、allow_url_include、已注册 wrapper 和 PECL expect 状态。
prerequisites.en: PHP version, allow_url_fopen, allow_url_include, registered wrappers, and PECL expect status are recorded.

analysis.zh: PHP Filter、Data、Expect 与无效 Input Wrapper 混合集必须按实际数据流判定。每组只接受对应结果：filter 需返回标记源码，data 需被目标 API 实际读取或解释，expect 需有扩展和受控进程证据；URI 回显、警告、base64 文本或 input:// 错误均是假阳性。还应保存原始值、完全解码或规范值、最终处理器、运行身份和同一请求 ID 的服务端证据，以区分入口接受、静态存储、读取、解析和执行。
analysis.en: Mixed PHP Filter, Data, Expect, and Invalid Input Wrappers must be judged from the actual data flow. Each branch has separate proof: filter must return marker source, data must be read or interpreted by the target API, and expect needs the extension plus controlled process evidence; URI reflection, warnings, base64 text, or input:// errors are false positives. Preserve the raw value, fully decoded or canonical value, final processor, runtime identity, and server evidence for the same request identifier to distinguish entry acceptance, static storage, reading, parsing, and execution.

opsecTips.zh: 验证“PHP Filter、Data、Expect 与无效 Input Wrapper 混合集”时每轮只使用一个固定标记；一旦出现真实敏感数据、非预期解释、进程创建、写入、外连或服务不稳定，立即停止并保留请求 ID。
opsecTips.en: For Mixed PHP Filter, Data, Expect, and Invalid Input Wrappers, use one fixed marker per run; stop immediately and retain the request identifier on real sensitive data, unintended interpretation, process creation, writes, egress, or service instability.

opsecTips.zh: 完成“PHP Filter、Data、Expect 与无效 Input Wrapper 混合集”后删除上传文件、测试归档、标记文件和临时监听器，清理对象存储、CDN 与解析缓存，并按保留策略处理包含标记的日志。
opsecTips.en: After Mixed PHP Filter, Data, Expect, and Invalid Input Wrappers, delete uploads, test archives, marker files, and temporary listeners, clear object-store, CDN, and parser caches, and handle marker-bearing logs under the retention policy.

review.rationale: PHP Filter、Data、Expect 与无效 Input Wrapper 混合集按逐行结果拆分，因为原命令混合多个 sink、scheme、解析器或证据标准，原单体条目不再保留。
lineDisposition: lines 12-14 -> retire: input:// is not php://input and is not a standard registered PHP wrapper

name.zh: 旧版 PHP 文件路径空字节截断

description.zh: 使用 URL 编码空字节和后缀组合验证旧版 PHP 或底层 C 文件 API 是否在安全校验与最终打开之间截断路径；现代 PHP 通常拒绝 NUL，必须以实际版本和文件访问证据判定。
description.en: Uses URL-encoded null bytes and suffix combinations to test whether legacy PHP or an underlying C file API truncates a path between validation and final open; modern PHP generally rejects NUL, so findings require version and file-access evidence.

overview.zh: 旧版 PHP 文件路径空字节截断用于审查URL 解码后的 NUL 是否跨过应用后缀拼接并在底层文件 API 中提前终止路径。使用 URL 编码空字节和后缀组合验证旧版 PHP 或底层 C 文件 API 是否在安全校验与最终打开之间截断路径；现代 PHP 通常拒绝 NUL，必须以实际版本和文件访问证据判定。该条目保留为 Payload，是因为它给出了能直接送入目标参数的完整输入，但仍必须把输入字符串与后端实际处理结果分开。执行前必须满足两个前提：目标运行时和文件函数版本已确认，并可在允许根目录外放置无敏感测试标记。能够关联原始 URL、完全解码值、应用拼接结果、规范路径和文件访问日志。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: Legacy PHP File-Path Null-Byte Truncation reviews whether a decoded NUL bypasses application suffix appending and terminates the path early in the underlying file API. Uses URL-encoded null bytes and suffix combinations to test whether legacy PHP or an underlying C file API truncates a path between validation and final open; modern PHP generally rejects NUL, so findings require version and file-access evidence. This entry remains a payload because it provides complete input that can be placed in the target parameter, while the input string must still be separated from actual backend processing. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: The runtime and file-function versions are confirmed, with a nonsensitive marker placed outside the allowed root. Raw URL, fully decoded value, application-appended path, canonical path, and file-access logs can be correlated. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: 旧版 PHP 文件路径空字节截断关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是URL 解码后的 NUL 是否跨过应用后缀拼接并在底层文件 API 中提前终止路径发生安全边界错配。阳性必须证明 NUL 后缀在最终文件调用前被截断，并实际读取隔离标记；400/500、NUL 警告、参数回显或旧漏洞文档与目标无关时均为假阳性。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: Legacy PHP File-Path Null-Byte Truncation is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in whether a decoded NUL bypasses application suffix appending and terminates the path early in the underlying file API. A positive requires proof that the suffix after NUL is truncated before the final file call and that the isolated marker is read; 400 or 500 responses, NUL warnings, reflection, or unrelated legacy documentation are false positives. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为旧版 PHP 文件路径空字节截断建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。
exploitation.en: For Legacy PHP File-Path Null-Byte Truncation, establish one valid business sample and one explicit rejection control, then hold content, identity, and request path constant while replacing one source line at a time. Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: 旧版 PHP 文件路径空字节截断的修复策略是：升级受支持的 PHP，拒绝控制字符和 NUL，完全解码后解析规范绝对路径，并在文件 API 前强制固定根目录。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。
mitigation.en: For Legacy PHP File-Path Null-Byte Truncation, remediation is: Use supported PHP, reject controls and NUL, fully decode and resolve a canonical absolute path, and enforce a fixed root immediately before file access. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

title.zh: 界定“旧版 PHP 文件路径空字节截断”入口
title.en: Define the Legacy PHP File-Path Null-Byte Truncation entry

description.zh: 定位输入参数、全部解码或规范化层、最终处理器和运行身份，并逐项确认前提“目标运行时和文件函数版本已确认，并可在允许根目录外放置无敏感测试标记。”与“能够关联原始 URL、完全解码值、应用拼接结果、规范路径和文件访问日志。”。

Raw URL, fully decoded value, application-appended path, canonical path, and file-access logs can be correlated.

title.zh: 建立“路径空字节截断”对照基线
title.en: Establish the Path Null-Byte Truncation control baseline

description.zh: 使用合法业务对象、明确拒绝对象和无敏感固定标记记录响应、规范值、文件或网络事件以及处理器选择，作为后续逐行比较基线。
description.en: Use a valid business object, an explicitly rejected object, and a nonsensitive fixed marker to record response, canonical value, file or network events, and processor selection as the line-by-line baseline.

title.zh: 逐行验证“旧版 PHP 文件路径空字节截断”
title.en: Validate Legacy PHP File-Path Null-Byte Truncation line by line

description.zh: 严格保留原始集合的字节和顺序，每轮只提交一行，并把危险目标替换为隔离标记。按“阳性必须证明 NUL 后缀在最终文件调用前被截断，并实际读取隔离标记；400/500、NUL 警告、参数回显或旧漏洞文档与目标无关时均为假阳性。”判定结果，禁止从字符串命中直接推导漏洞。
description.en: Preserve the original set byte-for-byte and in order, submit one line per run, and replace dangerous targets with isolated markers. Apply this result boundary: A positive requires proof that the suffix after NUL is truncated before the final file call and that the isolated marker is read; 400 or 500 responses, NUL warnings, reflection, or unrelated legacy documentation are false positives.

name.zh: PHP ZIP 与 PHAR 上传归档成员包含
name.en: PHP ZIP and PHAR Uploaded Archive Member Inclusion

description.zh: 使用 zip:// 和 phar:// 指向已上传归档成员，验证文件包含参数是否跨入归档解析器；ZIP 成员解释、PHAR 成员访问与 PHAR 元数据反序列化是不同边界，不能从 URI 接受直接推导 RCE。
description.en: Uses zip:// and phar:// references to members of uploaded archives to test whether a file-inclusion parameter reaches an archive parser; ZIP member interpretation, PHAR member access, and PHAR metadata deserialization are distinct boundaries and URI acceptance does not imply RCE.

subCategory.zh: 上传归档 Wrapper 包含

overview.zh: PHP ZIP 与 PHAR 上传归档成员包含用于审查上传对象的真实路径、ZIP 井号成员分隔、PHAR 解析行为以及读取函数和 include 的差异。使用 zip:// 和 phar:// 指向已上传归档成员，验证文件包含参数是否跨入归档解析器；ZIP 成员解释、PHAR 成员访问与 PHAR 元数据反序列化是不同边界，不能从 URI 接受直接推导 RCE。该条目保留为 Payload，是因为它给出了能直接送入目标参数的完整输入，但仍必须把输入字符串与后端实际处理结果分开。执行前必须满足两个前提：隔离环境中可上传只含固定文本成员的 ZIP 或 PHAR，并确认最终磁盘路径。已确认 PHP 版本、zip/phar wrapper 可用性、目标函数和上传目录执行权限。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: PHP ZIP and PHAR Uploaded Archive Member Inclusion reviews the uploaded object's real path, ZIP hash member delimiter, PHAR parsing behavior, and the distinction between read functions and include. Uses zip:// and phar:// references to members of uploaded archives to test whether a file-inclusion parameter reaches an archive parser; ZIP member interpretation, PHAR member access, and PHAR metadata deserialization are distinct boundaries and URI acceptance does not imply RCE. This entry remains a payload because it provides complete input that can be placed in the target parameter, while the input string must still be separated from actual backend processing. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: A ZIP or PHAR containing only a fixed text member can be uploaded in isolation, with its final disk path known. PHP version, zip and phar wrapper availability, target function, and upload-directory execution permissions are known. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: PHP ZIP 与 PHAR 上传归档成员包含关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是上传对象的真实路径、ZIP 井号成员分隔、PHAR 解析行为以及读取函数和 include 的差异发生安全边界错配。阳性按层次判定：成员读取需返回固定标记，代码包含需有无副作用模板标记，PHAR 反序列化还需独立元数据调用证据；上传成功、URI 回显或归档错误都不足。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: PHP ZIP and PHAR Uploaded Archive Member Inclusion is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in the uploaded object's real path, ZIP hash member delimiter, PHAR parsing behavior, and the distinction between read functions and include. Evidence is tiered: member read needs the fixed marker, code inclusion needs a side-effect-free template marker, and PHAR deserialization needs separate metadata-call evidence; upload success, URI reflection, or archive errors are insufficient. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为PHP ZIP 与 PHAR 上传归档成员包含建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。
exploitation.en: For PHP ZIP and PHAR Uploaded Archive Member Inclusion, establish one valid business sample and one explicit rejection control, then hold content, identity, and request path constant while replacing one source line at a time. Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: PHP ZIP 与 PHAR 上传归档成员包含的修复策略是：禁止用户输入进入 include/require，上传目录保持不可执行且位于 Web 根外，读取接口只接收对象 ID 并拒绝非 file scheme。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。
mitigation.en: For PHP ZIP and PHAR Uploaded Archive Member Inclusion, remediation is: Keep user input out of include or require, store uploads nonexecutable outside the web root, accept object IDs for reads, and reject non-file schemes. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

prerequisites.en: A ZIP or PHAR containing only a fixed text member can be uploaded in isolation, with its final disk path known.

prerequisites.zh: 已确认 PHP 版本、zip/phar wrapper 可用性、目标函数和上传目录执行权限。
prerequisites.en: PHP version, zip and phar wrapper availability, target function, and upload-directory execution permissions are known.

analysis.zh: PHP ZIP 与 PHAR 上传归档成员包含必须按实际数据流判定。阳性按层次判定：成员读取需返回固定标记，代码包含需有无副作用模板标记，PHAR 反序列化还需独立元数据调用证据；上传成功、URI 回显或归档错误都不足。还应保存原始值、完全解码或规范值、最终处理器、运行身份和同一请求 ID 的服务端证据，以区分入口接受、静态存储、读取、解析和执行。
analysis.en: PHP ZIP and PHAR Uploaded Archive Member Inclusion must be judged from the actual data flow. Evidence is tiered: member read needs the fixed marker, code inclusion needs a side-effect-free template marker, and PHAR deserialization needs separate metadata-call evidence; upload success, URI reflection, or archive errors are insufficient. Preserve the raw value, fully decoded or canonical value, final processor, runtime identity, and server evidence for the same request identifier to distinguish entry acceptance, static storage, reading, parsing, and execution.

opsecTips.zh: 验证“PHP ZIP 与 PHAR 上传归档成员包含”时每轮只使用一个固定标记；一旦出现真实敏感数据、非预期解释、进程创建、写入、外连或服务不稳定，立即停止并保留请求 ID。
opsecTips.en: For PHP ZIP and PHAR Uploaded Archive Member Inclusion, use one fixed marker per run; stop immediately and retain the request identifier on real sensitive data, unintended interpretation, process creation, writes, egress, or service instability.

opsecTips.zh: 完成“PHP ZIP 与 PHAR 上传归档成员包含”后删除上传文件、测试归档、标记文件和临时监听器，清理对象存储、CDN 与解析缓存，并按保留策略处理包含标记的日志。
opsecTips.en: After PHP ZIP and PHAR Uploaded Archive Member Inclusion, delete uploads, test archives, marker files, and temporary listeners, clear object-store, CDN, and parser caches, and handle marker-bearing logs under the retention policy.

review.rationale: PHP ZIP 与 PHAR 上传归档成员包含保留为 Payload，因为它是可直接送入明确参数的输入集合，并已补齐运行时前提和阳性/假阳性证据边界。

name.zh: 日志、会话与 Proc 文件路径字典
name.en: Log, Session, and Proc File Path Dictionary

description.zh: 列出常见 Web、认证、邮件、PHP 会话和 /proc 路径，用于在已确认文件包含原语后选择最小影响目标；它不包含写入日志的投毒请求，路径列表本身不是日志投毒漏洞。
description.en: Lists common web, authentication, mail, PHP session, and /proc paths for choosing a minimal target after a file-inclusion primitive is confirmed; it contains no log-writing request, so the path list itself is not a log-poisoning vulnerability.

subCategory.zh: 日志与运行时路径字典

overview.zh: 日志、会话与 Proc 文件路径字典用于审查应用身份对日志、会话和 procfs 的实际可读性，以及是否另有可控写入渠道。列出常见 Web、认证、邮件、PHP 会话和 /proc 路径，用于在已确认文件包含原语后选择最小影响目标；它不包含写入日志的投毒请求，路径列表本身不是日志投毒漏洞。该条目迁入工具区，因为原内容是候选字典而不是完整请求；它只能用于选择样例，不能单凭命中宣告漏洞。执行前必须满足两个前提：已用无敏感标记确认文件读取或包含原语，且授权明确允许检查日志边界。能区分路径存在、应用可读、输入可写和内容被解释四个阶段。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: Log, Session, and Proc File Path Dictionary reviews actual readability of logs, sessions, and procfs by the application identity and whether a separate controllable write channel exists. Lists common web, authentication, mail, PHP session, and /proc paths for choosing a minimal target after a file-inclusion primitive is confirmed; it contains no log-writing request, so the path list itself is not a log-poisoning vulnerability. This entry moves to Tools because the source is a candidate dictionary rather than a complete request; it selects samples and cannot establish a vulnerability by matching alone. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: A file-read or inclusion primitive is confirmed with a nonsensitive marker, and authorization covers log-boundary testing. Path existence, application readability, controllable writing, and content interpretation can be distinguished. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: 日志、会话与 Proc 文件路径字典关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是应用身份对日志、会话和 procfs 的实际可读性，以及是否另有可控写入渠道发生安全边界错配。只有可控写入与后续包含在同一文件上关联，并由固定标记或解释日志证明，才是日志投毒链；404、权限错误、路径泄露或仅能读取现有日志不是投毒。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: Log, Session, and Proc File Path Dictionary is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in actual readability of logs, sessions, and procfs by the application identity and whether a separate controllable write channel exists. A log-poisoning chain requires correlated controllable writing and later inclusion of the same file with marker or interpretation evidence; 404s, permission errors, path disclosure, or read-only access to an existing log are not poisoning. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为日志、会话与 Proc 文件路径字典建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。
exploitation.en: For Log, Session, and Proc File Path Dictionary, establish one valid business sample and one explicit rejection control, then hold content, identity, and request path constant while replacing one source line at a time. Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: 日志、会话与 Proc 文件路径字典的修复策略是：隔离日志和会话权限，禁止包含用户可写文件，文件入口使用对象映射，并对日志中的控制字符和敏感数据规范化。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。
mitigation.en: For Log, Session, and Proc File Path Dictionary, remediation is: Isolate log and session permissions, prevent inclusion of user-writable files, use object mapping for file entries, and normalize controls and sensitive data in logs. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

title.zh: 界定“日志、会话与 Proc 文件路径字典”入口
title.en: Define the Log, Session, and Proc File Path Dictionary entry

description.zh: 定位输入参数、全部解码或规范化层、最终处理器和运行身份，并逐项确认前提“已用无敏感标记确认文件读取或包含原语，且授权明确允许检查日志边界。”与“能区分路径存在、应用可读、输入可写和内容被解释四个阶段。”。
description.en: Locate the input parameter, every decoding or canonicalization layer, the final processor, and runtime identity, then confirm both prerequisites: A file-read or inclusion primitive is confirmed with a nonsensitive marker, and authorization covers log-boundary testing. Path existence, application readability, controllable writing, and content interpretation can be distinguished.

title.zh: 建立“日志与运行时路径字典”对照基线
title.en: Establish the Log and Runtime Path Dictionary control baseline

description.zh: 使用合法业务对象、明确拒绝对象和无敏感固定标记记录响应、规范值、文件或网络事件以及处理器选择，作为后续逐行比较基线。
description.en: Use a valid business object, an explicitly rejected object, and a nonsensitive fixed marker to record response, canonical value, file or network events, and processor selection as the line-by-line baseline.

title.zh: 逐行验证“日志、会话与 Proc 文件路径字典”
title.en: Validate Log, Session, and Proc File Path Dictionary line by line

description.zh: 严格保留原始集合的字节和顺序，每轮只提交一行，并把危险目标替换为隔离标记。按“只有可控写入与后续包含在同一文件上关联，并由固定标记或解释日志证明，才是日志投毒链；404、权限错误、路径泄露或仅能读取现有日志不是投毒。”判定结果，禁止从字符串命中直接推导漏洞。
description.en: Preserve the original set byte-for-byte and in order, submit one line per run, and replace dangerous targets with isolated markers. Apply this result boundary: A log-poisoning chain requires correlated controllable writing and later inclusion of the same file with marker or interpretation evidence; 404s, permission errors, path disclosure, or read-only access to an existing log are not poisoning.

title.zh: 修复并回归“日志、会话与 Proc 文件路径字典”
title.en: Remediate and regress Log, Session, and Proc File Path Dictionary

description.zh: 实施“隔离日志和会话权限，禁止包含用户可写文件，文件入口使用对象映射，并对日志中的控制字符和敏感数据规范化。”后，从同一入口重放正常与异常对照；确认业务功能未退化、危险边界不可达，并删除本次测试产生的文件、归档、缓存和关联数据。
description.en: After applying this remediation: Isolate log and session permissions, prevent inclusion of user-writable files, use object mapping for file entries, and normalize controls and sensitive data in logs. Replay normal and abnormal controls through the same entry, confirm business behavior remains intact and the dangerous boundary is unreachable, and delete files, archives, caches, and correlated data created by the test.

prerequisites.zh: 已用无敏感标记确认文件读取或包含原语，且授权明确允许检查日志边界。

prerequisites.zh: 能区分路径存在、应用可读、输入可写和内容被解释四个阶段。
prerequisites.en: Path existence, application readability, controllable writing, and content interpretation can be distinguished.

Preserve the raw value, fully decoded or canonical value, final processor, runtime identity, and server evidence for the same request identifier to distinguish entry acceptance, static storage, reading, parsing, and execution.

opsecTips.en: For Log, Session, and Proc File Path Dictionary, use one fixed marker per run; stop immediately and retain the request identifier on real sensitive data, unintended interpretation, process creation, writes, egress, or service instability.

opsecTips.zh: 完成“日志、会话与 Proc 文件路径字典”后删除上传文件、测试归档、标记文件和临时监听器，清理对象存储、CDN 与解析缓存，并按保留策略处理包含标记的日志。

review.rationale: 日志、会话与 Proc 文件路径字典迁入工具区，因为它是扩展名、媒体类型、魔数或路径候选字典，不是完整攻击请求，也不能单独证明漏洞。

name.zh: Windows 本地敏感文件路径字典
name.en: Windows Local Sensitive File Path Dictionary

description.zh: 列出 hosts、networks、旧修复注册表配置单元、boot.ini 和 IIS web.config 路径，用于已确认任意文件读取后的平台化影响检查；文件可能不存在、受 ACL 保护或属于旧版系统。
description.en: Lists hosts, networks, legacy repair registry hives, boot.ini, and IIS web.config paths for platform-specific impact checks after arbitrary read is confirmed; files may be absent, ACL-protected, or specific to legacy systems.

subCategory.zh: Windows 本地文件目标字典

overview.zh: Windows 本地敏感文件路径字典用于审查目标 Windows 版本、实际文件存在性和应用服务账户 ACL 共同限定的读取范围。列出 hosts、networks、旧修复注册表配置单元、boot.ini 和 IIS web.config 路径，用于已确认任意文件读取后的平台化影响检查；文件可能不存在、受 ACL 保护或属于旧版系统。该条目迁入工具区，因为原内容是候选字典而不是完整请求；它只能用于选择样例，不能单凭命中宣告漏洞。执行前必须满足两个前提：已确认目标是 Windows，并先用专用无敏感测试文件证明读取原语。授权范围允许最小化存在性检查，且报告流程可以立即遮盖配置与主机数据。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: Windows Local Sensitive File Path Dictionary reviews the read scope jointly constrained by the Windows version, actual file existence, and application service-account ACLs. Lists hosts, networks, legacy repair registry hives, boot.ini, and IIS web.config paths for platform-specific impact checks after arbitrary read is confirmed; files may be absent, ACL-protected, or specific to legacy systems. This entry moves to Tools because the source is a candidate dictionary rather than a complete request; it selects samples and cannot establish a vulnerability by matching alone. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: The target is confirmed as Windows, and a dedicated nonsensitive file first proves the read primitive. Scope permits minimal existence checks, and the reporting process can immediately redact configuration and host data. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: Windows 本地敏感文件路径字典关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是目标 Windows 版本、实际文件存在性和应用服务账户 ACL 共同限定的读取范围发生安全边界错配。阳性需要应用进程实际读取目标或同目录标记的文件审计；错误页显示 Windows 路径、静态文档、空响应或不存在的旧路径都不能证明读取。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: Windows Local Sensitive File Path Dictionary is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in the read scope jointly constrained by the Windows version, actual file existence, and application service-account ACLs. A positive requires file audit showing the application process read the target or a same-directory marker; Windows paths in errors, static documentation, empty responses, or absent legacy paths do not prove reading. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为Windows 本地敏感文件路径字典建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。
exploitation.en: For Windows Local Sensitive File Path Dictionary, establish one valid business sample and one explicit rejection control, then hold content, identity, and request path constant while replacing one source line at a time. Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: Windows 本地敏感文件路径字典的修复策略是：使用对象 ID 替代路径，规范化后强制固定根目录，并以低权限服务账户阻止访问系统和站点配置。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。
mitigation.en: For Windows Local Sensitive File Path Dictionary, remediation is: Replace paths with object IDs, enforce a fixed root after canonicalization, and use a low-privilege service account that cannot read system or site configuration. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

name.zh: Linux 本地敏感文件与通配路径字典
name.en: Linux Local Sensitive File and Glob Path Dictionary

description.zh: 列出系统身份、服务配置、Web 应用配置、Shell 历史、SSH 密钥和 procfs 通配目标，用于已确认 LFI 后评估读取权限；通配符只有目标代码主动展开时才生效。
description.en: Lists identity files, service configuration, web application configuration, shell history, SSH keys, and procfs glob targets for assessing read privileges after LFI is confirmed; wildcards work only when target code explicitly expands them.

subCategory.zh: Linux 本地文件目标字典

overview.zh: Linux 本地敏感文件与通配路径字典用于审查应用账户的文件权限、容器或 chroot 视图以及目标函数是否执行 glob 展开。列出系统身份、服务配置、Web 应用配置、Shell 历史、SSH 密钥和 procfs 通配目标，用于已确认 LFI 后评估读取权限；通配符只有目标代码主动展开时才生效。该条目迁入工具区，因为原内容是候选字典而不是完整请求；它只能用于选择样例，不能单凭命中宣告漏洞。执行前必须满足两个前提：已通过隔离标记确认文件读取，并知道应用运行在主机、容器还是 chroot。只选择与已知技术栈匹配的最低敏感路径，禁止批量提取真实密钥或历史。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: Linux Local Sensitive File and Glob Path Dictionary reviews application-account file permissions, container or chroot views, and whether the target function performs glob expansion. Lists identity files, service configuration, web application configuration, shell history, SSH keys, and procfs glob targets for assessing read privileges after LFI is confirmed; wildcards work only when target code explicitly expands them. This entry moves to Tools because the source is a candidate dictionary rather than a complete request; it selects samples and cannot establish a vulnerability by matching alone. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: File reading is confirmed with an isolated marker, and the host, container, or chroot execution context is known. Only the least-sensitive path matching the known stack is selected; bulk extraction of real keys or history is excluded. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: Linux 本地敏感文件与通配路径字典关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是应用账户的文件权限、容器或 chroot 视图以及目标函数是否执行 glob 展开发生安全边界错配。阳性需要文件访问审计或固定非敏感片段证明应用实际读取；字面返回星号、权限错误、软 404、路径回显和容器内不存在均不是读取证据。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: Linux Local Sensitive File and Glob Path Dictionary is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in application-account file permissions, container or chroot views, and whether the target function performs glob expansion. A positive requires file audit or a fixed nonsensitive fragment proving an application read; literal wildcard return, permission error, soft 404, path reflection, or absence inside a container are not evidence. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为Linux 本地敏感文件与通配路径字典建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。
exploitation.en: For Linux Local Sensitive File and Glob Path Dictionary, establish one valid business sample and one explicit rejection control, then hold content, identity, and request path constant while replacing one source line at a time. Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: Linux 本地敏感文件与通配路径字典的修复策略是：将客户端对象映射到固定文件 ID，应用最小文件权限，隔离配置和密钥，并拒绝绝对路径、通配符和父目录段。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。
mitigation.en: For Linux Local Sensitive File and Glob Path Dictionary, remediation is: Map client objects to fixed file IDs, apply least filesystem privilege, isolate configuration and keys, and reject absolute paths, wildcards, and parent segments. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

name.zh: File URI、回环地址与带外主机 SSRF 混合集
name.en: Mixed File URI, Loopback Address, and Out-of-Band Host SSRF Set

description.zh: 该集合混合 file:// 本地读取、IPv4/IPv6/数字和 DNS 回环表示，以及外部带外域名，分别依赖 URL scheme、解析器规范化和出站网络能力，必须拆分验证。
description.en: This set mixes file:// local reads, IPv4, IPv6, numeric, and DNS loopback forms, and an external out-of-band hostname; they depend on URL schemes, parser canonicalization, and egress capability and must be validated separately.

subCategory.zh: SSRF Scheme 与地址混合集拆分
subCategory.en: SSRF Scheme and Address Mixed-Set Split

overview.zh: File URI、回环地址与带外主机 SSRF 混合集用于审查URL 获取器是否支持 file scheme、不同地址表示最终规范化到何处，以及 DNS 与应用源连接如何关联。该集合混合 file:// 本地读取、IPv4/IPv6/数字和 DNS 回环表示，以及外部带外域名，分别依赖 URL scheme、解析器规范化和出站网络能力，必须拆分验证。该条目必须拆分，因为同一命令跨越多个入口或解析器；每一行只能按其真实 sink 归入对应目标。执行前必须满足两个前提：可观察 URL 解析后的 scheme、主机和目标 IP，并使用隔离回环服务与自有带外域名。已禁止访问真实本地敏感文件和云元数据，所有目标均替换为固定测试标记。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: Mixed File URI, Loopback Address, and Out-of-Band Host SSRF Set reviews whether the URL fetcher supports the file scheme, where alternate address forms canonicalize, and how DNS is correlated with an application-origin connection. This set mixes file:// local reads, IPv4, IPv6, numeric, and DNS loopback forms, and an external out-of-band hostname; they depend on URL schemes, parser canonicalization, and egress capability and must be validated separately. This entry must be split because one command crosses multiple entries or parsers; every line belongs only to the target matching its real sink. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: The parsed scheme, host, and destination IP are observable, with an isolated loopback service and owned out-of-band domain. Access to real local sensitive files and cloud metadata is excluded, with every target replaced by a fixed test marker. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: File URI、回环地址与带外主机 SSRF 混合集关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是URL 获取器是否支持 file scheme、不同地址表示最终规范化到何处，以及 DNS 与应用源连接如何关联发生安全边界错配。file 分支需应用读取标记文件，回环分支需内部监听器记录应用源请求，带外分支需请求令牌与 DNS/HTTP 事件关联；DNS 解析、URL 回显或客户端自身访问均是假阳性。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: Mixed File URI, Loopback Address, and Out-of-Band Host SSRF Set is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in whether the URL fetcher supports the file scheme, where alternate address forms canonicalize, and how DNS is correlated with an application-origin connection. The file branch needs an application read of a marker, loopback needs an application-origin request at the internal listener, and out-of-band needs token-correlated DNS or HTTP events; DNS resolution, URL reflection, or client-side access are false positives. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为File URI、回环地址与带外主机 SSRF 混合集建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。
exploitation.en: For Mixed File URI, Loopback Address, and Out-of-Band Host SSRF Set, establish one valid business sample and one explicit rejection control, then hold content, identity, and request path constant while replacing one source line at a time. Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: File URI、回环地址与带外主机 SSRF 混合集的修复策略是：对 URL 完全解析和规范化后实施 scheme、主机与解析 IP 允许列表，阻断本地文件和私网目标，并在重定向后再次校验。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。
mitigation.en: For Mixed File URI, Loopback Address, and Out-of-Band Host SSRF Set, remediation is: Fully parse and canonicalize URLs, allowlist schemes, hosts, and resolved IPs, block local-file and private destinations, and repeat validation after redirects. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.
