name.zh: 路径遍历、PHP Wrapper 与上传文件名混合清单
name.en: Mixed Path Traversal, PHP Wrapper, and Upload Filename List

description.zh: 该集合把路径规范化、敏感文件目标、PHP filter/input/data/zip/phar wrapper 和 PHP 上传文件名放在同一命令中，入口、解析器与证据标准不一致，必须逐行路由。
description.en: This collection combines path canonicalization, sensitive file targets, PHP filter, input, data, zip, and phar wrappers, and PHP upload filenames in one command; their entries, parsers, and evidence standards differ and require line-level routing.

overview.zh: 路径遍历、PHP Wrapper 与上传文件名混合清单用于审查路径参数、URL 获取器、PHP 文件 API 和 multipart 文件名四种完全不同的输入边界。该集合把路径规范化、敏感文件目标、PHP filter/input/data/zip/phar wrapper 和 PHP 上传文件名放在同一命令中，入口、解析器与证据标准不一致，必须逐行路由。该条目必须拆分，因为同一命令跨越多个入口或解析器；每一行只能按其真实 sink 归入对应目标。执行前必须满足两个前提：先识别每个测试入口最终到达的是文件打开、URL 获取、PHP include 还是上传存储逻辑。为每个分支准备独立无敏感标记和日志关联，禁止把整个清单一次性提交。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。
overview.en: Mixed Path Traversal, PHP Wrapper, and Upload Filename List reviews four distinct input boundaries: path parameters, URL fetchers, PHP file APIs, and multipart filenames. This collection combines path canonicalization, sensitive file targets, PHP filter, input, data, zip, and phar wrappers, and PHP upload filenames in one command; their entries, parsers, and evidence standards differ and require line-level routing. This entry must be split because one command crosses multiple entries or parsers; every line belongs only to the target matching its real sink. Before execution, both prerequisites apply: Each test entry is first mapped to file open, URL fetch, PHP include, or upload-storage logic. Each branch has an independent nonsensitive marker and log correlation; submitting the entire list at once is excluded. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: 路径遍历、PHP Wrapper 与上传文件名混合清单关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是路径参数、URL 获取器、PHP 文件 API 和 multipart 文件名四种完全不同的输入边界发生安全边界错配。每个分支必须使用自己的阳性证据：规范路径越界、标记文件读取、对应 wrapper 处理或上传对象进入执行处理器；错误码、字符串回显、文件名接受和 URI 解析警告不可交叉推断。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。
vulnerability.en: Mixed Path Traversal, PHP Wrapper, and Upload Filename List is not vulnerable because a string appears in a dictionary; the root condition is a security-boundary mismatch in four distinct input boundaries: path parameters, URL fetchers, PHP file APIs, and multipart filenames. Each branch needs its own proof: canonical path escape, marker-file read, matching wrapper processing, or an upload reaching an executable handler; errors, reflection, filename acceptance, and URI warnings cannot be inferred across branches. The review must identify runtime, operating system, server module, target function, and process privileges instead of importing behavior from an obsolete or unrelated stack.

exploitation.zh: 先为路径遍历、PHP Wrapper 与上传文件名混合清单建立合法业务样例和明确拒绝样例，再保持内容、身份和请求路径不变，每次只替换原命令中的一行。所有系统路径、代码、地址和文件均改为隔离固定标记；关联应用日志、文件审计、处理器跟踪与响应。出现非预期写入、进程创建、外连、权限变化或真实数据返回时立即停止。
exploitation.en: For Mixed Path Traversal, PHP Wrapper, and Upload Filename List, establish one valid business sample and one explicit rejection control, then hold content, identity, and request path constant while replacing one source line at a time. Substitute isolated fixed markers for system paths, code, addresses, and files, and correlate application logs, file audit, processor traces, and responses. Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

mitigation.zh: 路径遍历、PHP Wrapper 与上传文件名混合清单的修复策略是：按入口分别实施规范路径根约束、URL 目标校验、PHP scheme 限制和不可执行上传存储，不使用单一正则覆盖所有文件边界。修复后从同一入口重放合法样例、最小异常样例和原始逐行集合，确认正常上传或读取功能保留，同时危险解析器、越界目标和可执行路径均不可达；最后清除测试对象、缓存和日志中的固定标记。
mitigation.en: For Mixed Path Traversal, PHP Wrapper, and Upload Filename List, remediation is: Apply canonical-root enforcement, URL destination validation, PHP scheme restrictions, and nonexecutable upload storage at their respective entries rather than one regex for every file boundary. From the same entry, replay the valid sample, minimized abnormal sample, and original line set to preserve normal upload or read behavior while dangerous parsers, out-of-bound targets, and executable paths remain unreachable. Finally remove test objects, caches, and marker-bearing logs.

description.zh: 该集合混合 filter 变换、PHAR 成员路径、Linux/Windows 遍历、data 内联内容和 expect 命令 wrapper，各自需要不同扩展、函数和版本前提，不能作为单一 LFI Payload。

subCategory.zh: PHP 与路径混合集拆分

overview.zh: PHP Filter、PHAR、遍历、Data 与 Expect 混合集用于审查filter 链的输出变换、PHAR 归档处理、路径规范化、data include 配置和 expect 扩展边界。该集合混合 filter 变换、PHAR 成员路径、Linux/Windows 遍历、data 内联内容和 expect 命令 wrapper，各自需要不同扩展、函数和版本前提，不能作为单一 LFI Payload。该条目必须拆分，因为同一命令跨越多个入口或解析器；每一行只能按其真实 sink 归入对应目标。执行前必须满足两个前提：已确认目标 PHP 版本、注册 wrapper、allow_url_include、expect 扩展和实际文件 API。路径和流样例分别使用无敏感文件、纯文本归档成员与无副作用固定标记。结论应同时记录输入、规范化值、最终处理器与服务端证据。

Path and stream samples use nonsensitive files, plain-text archive members, and side-effect-free fixed markers separately. Record the input, canonical value, final processor, and server-side evidence together.

vulnerability.zh: PHP Filter、PHAR、遍历、Data 与 Expect 混合集关注的根因不是字符串出现在字典中，而是filter 链的输出变换、PHAR 归档处理、路径规范化、data include 配置和 expect 扩展边界发生安全边界错配。filter 要有转换后的标记内容，PHAR 要有成员或元数据处理证据，遍历要有规范路径越界，data/expect 要有相应配置和处理日志；错误、回显与静态源码不通用地证明 RCE。审计时必须标明运行时、操作系统、服务器模块、目标函数和身份权限，不能把旧版本语义或别的技术栈行为套到当前目标。

Stop on any unintended write, process creation, egress, privilege change, or real-data return.

title.zh: 修复并回归“PHP Filter、PHAR、遍历、Data 与 Expect 混合集”
title.en: Remediate and regress Mixed PHP Filter, PHAR, Traversal, Data, and Expect Set

description.zh: 实施“分离文件对象与路径，拒绝非 file scheme，禁止用户控制 include/require，关闭不需要的 wrapper 和扩展，并在最终文件调用前校验规范根目录。”后，从同一入口重放正常与异常对照；确认业务功能未退化、危险边界不可达，并删除本次测试产生的文件、归档、缓存和关联数据。
description.en: After applying this remediation: Separate file objects from paths, reject non-file schemes, keep user input out of include or require, disable unneeded wrappers and extensions, and validate the canonical root before the final file call. Replay normal and abnormal controls through the same entry, confirm business behavior remains intact and the dangerous boundary is unreachable, and delete files, archives, caches, and correlated data created by the test.

prerequisites.zh: 已确认目标 PHP 版本、注册 wrapper、allow_url_include、expect 扩展和实际文件 API。
prerequisites.en: The PHP version, registered wrappers, allow_url_include, expect extension, and actual file API are known.

prerequisites.zh: 路径和流样例分别使用无敏感文件、纯文本归档成员与无副作用固定标记。
prerequisites.en: Path and stream samples use nonsensitive files, plain-text archive members, and side-effect-free fixed markers separately.

analysis.zh: PHP Filter、PHAR、遍历、Data 与 Expect 混合集必须按实际数据流判定。filter 要有转换后的标记内容，PHAR 要有成员或元数据处理证据，遍历要有规范路径越界，data/expect 要有相应配置和处理日志；错误、回显与静态源码不通用地证明 RCE。还应保存原始值、完全解码或规范值、最终处理器、运行身份和同一请求 ID 的服务端证据，以区分入口接受、静态存储、读取、解析和执行。
analysis.en: Mixed PHP Filter, PHAR, Traversal, Data, and Expect Set must be judged from the actual data flow. Filter needs transformed marker content, PHAR needs member or metadata-processing evidence, traversal needs canonical escape, and data or expect needs matching configuration and processing logs; errors, reflection, and static source do not generally prove RCE. Preserve the raw value, fully decoded or canonical value, final processor, runtime identity, and server evidence for the same request identifier to distinguish entry acceptance, static storage, reading, parsing, and execution.

opsecTips.zh: 验证“PHP Filter、PHAR、遍历、Data 与 Expect 混合集”时每轮只使用一个固定标记；一旦出现真实敏感数据、非预期解释、进程创建、写入、外连或服务不稳定，立即停止并保留请求 ID。
opsecTips.en: For Mixed PHP Filter, PHAR, Traversal, Data, and Expect Set, use one fixed marker per run; stop immediately and retain the request identifier on real sensitive data, unintended interpretation, process creation, writes, egress, or service instability.

opsecTips.zh: 完成“PHP Filter、PHAR、遍历、Data 与 Expect 混合集”后删除上传文件、测试归档、标记文件和临时监听器，清理对象存储、CDN 与解析缓存，并按保留策略处理包含标记的日志。
opsecTips.en: After Mixed PHP Filter, PHAR, Traversal, Data, and Expect Set, delete uploads, test archives, marker files, and temporary listeners, clear object-store, CDN, and parser caches, and handle marker-bearing logs under the retention policy.

review.rationale: PHP Filter、PHAR、遍历、Data 与 Expect 混合集按逐行结果拆分，因为原命令混合多个 sink、scheme、解析器或证据标准，原单体条目不再保留。
